title: Institutional Rejection Wicks
author: archiedurrant
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Institutional Rejection Wicks by archiedurrant.
Overview The Institutional Rejection Wicks indicator helps SMC and ICT traders identify true Liquidity Sweeps.
It filters out random wicks, only highlighting extreme price rejections that are backed by a massive spike in institutional trading volume.
How to Read the Signals Bullish Sweeps (Green): A deep bottom wick on high volume.
Acts as a strongly defended Rejection Block and support zone.
Bearish Sweeps (Red): A large top wick on high volume.
